clue: ... stripped off woman often painted naked
explanation:
I don’t quite get this. I tried to “strip” five letter words meaning woman or a girl’s name, but couldn’t find one. I tried to make something of the ellipsis (three dots) at the start, but can’t quite see how that it’s stripped to leave EVE. But, E*E, it must be EVE.
